steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The claim states “marks a significant change in Martin's artistic development” — the supporting quote must show what came before Harbor Number 1 and how the work represents a departure from it.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content: Choice C distinguishes an “earlier style” that Martin never returned to, placing Harbor Number 1 at the threshold of a new creative phase. Choices A, B, and D focus on interpretation, influence, and artistic value without showing a shift in her development. That matches choice C — C is correct.
